qa_pairs.question: What should I use instead of anonymous FTP for read-only access?
qa_pairs.answer: For read-only access when considering anonymous FTP, you should use HTTP.

qa_pairs.question: What are the security risks associated with anonymous FTP for read/write access?
qa_pairs.answer: Accepting anonymous incoming file transfers for read/write access carries very great security risks.

qa_pairs.question: Who should I contact if I need a secure solution for anonymous FTP read/write access?
qa_pairs.answer: You should contact technical support and describe your use case so that they can help you find a secure solution.

qa_pairs.question: What is a safer and easier alternative to authenticating FTP users with usernames and passwords?
qa_pairs.answer: A safer and easier alternative to authenticating FTP users is SFTP.

qa_pairs.question: What is FTPS?
qa_pairs.answer: FTPS is an extension of FTP that uses TLS (Transport Layer Security) to encrypt data sent and received.

qa_pairs.question: Why should transmitted data be encrypted when authenticating users via passwords?
qa_pairs.answer: When authenticating users via passwords, the transmitted data should be encrypted to prevent an eavesdropper from discovering the password.

qa_pairs.question: Is it recommended to allow password logins to a virtual machine (VM) connected to the internet?
qa_pairs.answer: No, it is strongly recommended that you not allow password logins to your VM, as automated brute-force attempts to crack passwords can be expected on any machine connected to the internet.

qa_pairs.question: What authentication method is recommended instead of password logins for VMs?
qa_pairs.answer: Instead of password logins, ssh-key authentication is recommended for VMs.

qa_pairs.question: Can SFTP be configured to use ssh-key authentication?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, SFTP can be configured to use ssh-key authentication.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find guides for setting up FTP if I cannot choose an alternative?
qa_pairs.answer: If you do not have the freedom to choose an alternative to FTP, you can refer to guides for Ubuntu or CentOS 6, depending on your operating system.

qa_pairs.question: What port does FTP use to initiate file transfer requests?
qa_pairs.answer: FTP uses port 21 to initiate file transfer requests.

qa_pairs.question: On which ports can the actual FTP file transfer take place?
qa_pairs.answer: The actual FTP file transfer can take place on a randomly chosen port above port 1025, and port 20 can also be involved, depending on the FTP mode of operation.

qa_pairs.question: What ports generally need to be opened on a VM to allow FTP access?
qa_pairs.answer: To allow FTP access on your VM, you must open port 21, possibly port 20, and probably ports 1025 and above.

qa_pairs.question: Why are other protocols preferred over FTP?
qa_pairs.answer: Other protocols are preferred over FTP because every open port represents a security risk, and FTP requires multiple ports to be open.
